title: Java Thread Lifecycle and Common Operations
description: A flowchart illustrating the states of a Java thread and the methods that cause transitions between them.
relationships: Thread.start() moves from New to Runnable
Thread Scheduler selects a Runnable thread to move to Running
Thread.yield() moves from Running back to Runnable
Object.wait() or Thread.join() moves to Waiting
Thread.sleep() or Object.wait(timeout) moves to Timed Waiting
Synchronized I/O or lock contention moves to Blocked
run() method completes or Thread.stop() moves to Terminated
